info.description: A band of headline statistics (e.g. AUM, portfolio companies, exits).

heading.description: Section heading, e.g. 'Decades of VC Expertise'.

body.description: Longer body copy beneath the subheading. Separate paragraphs with a blank line.

stats.description: The individual statistics shown in the row.

footnote.description: Small print under the stats, e.g. '*As of March 30, 2026'.

theme.description: Colour style: 'navy' (dark band) or 'light' (white band with ice tiles).
